decisions: Build Wabi-Sabi engine as clean-room extraction layer, not as a fork/vendor of GDevelop, Dyad, OpenHands or Lovable.
Keep generated local-only engine plans and project specs under docs/engine/local_only and ignore that folder for publication safety.
Use modules observation_kernel, project_graph, app_core, game_core, programmer_core and extension_registry as the initial engine skeleton.
Implement project_graph + event_sheet as a deterministic executable spec before adding UI or heavier runtime code.
Implement a deterministic event_sheet interpreter before adding frontend rendering.
Validate project specs by graph integrity, event rule completeness, local-only visibility and canonical fingerprint.
pending: Add a renderer-neutral view model for the Observatorio Sandbox so future UI can consume state without binding to a web framework.
If executable app/game UI modules are added later, keep them behind tests and private RPG/TCG path blockers.
Any publication, push, deploy, Gumroad or social action remains BLOCK/REVIEW and was not performed.
next_action: Implement a renderer-neutral view model for the simulated Observatorio Sandbox state, then test CLI JSON output for UI consumption without external channels.
